issues.description: Missing required conditions: LeaderHasType 'Whitebeard Pirates' and life count ≤2. Current condition is 'Always'.
Action is 'Rest' but card effect restricts attack ability with conditional hand trash cost, not resting. Requires custom/unsupported mechanic or GiveKeyword 'Cannot Attack' with conditional cost.
Duration missing: effect lasts 'until end of opponent's next turn' (DuringOpponentTurn), not permanent. Required: duration:'DuringOpponentTurn'
Missing cost mechanic: opponent must trash 2 cards when attacking selected characters. Standard DSL cannot model conditional attack costs.
